home_intro: Free, in-browser piano practice — no account, nothing to install. Connect a MIDI keyboard or use your computer keys, then drill sight-reading, rhythm, tempo, and ear training, or practice any score. Every run is graded, and your scores and progress stay on your device.
home_favorites_empty: Star scores to pin them here for quick access.
home_about_heading: Practice piano online, in your browser
home_about_body: Plinky is a free piano-practice app with nothing to install and no sign-up. Plug in a MIDI keyboard — or just use your computer keyboard — and work through sight-reading, rhythm, tempo, and ear-training drills, or practice any piece note by note. Each run is graded on accuracy, timing, and flow, and everything you import or play stays on your device.
scores_intro: Every score on this device — the bundled public-domain pieces plus anything you've imported. Search by title or composer, filter by curriculum, and star what you're working on. Open one to read it, hear it, and practice it note by note.
perf_label: Each note placed by timing, ringed in red if the key was wrong, dashed if you hesitated
share_grid_label: Accuracy, timing and flow across six moments of the run
settings_mastery_threshold: Mark a score learned at grade
play_sprint_blurb: Fresh notes every run — play as many as you can before the timer runs out.
play_daily_blurb: A new piece every day, the same for everyone. Play it and share your grid.
daily_intro: A new piece every day, the same for everyone — a piano take on the daily puzzle. Play today's challenge, get graded, and share your result grid.
play_ear_blurb: Hear a note and find it by ear. No reading required.
settings_subtitle: Preferences are saved on this device.
settings_get_help: Get help or report a bug
curriculums_intro: Your scores grouped into curriculums — your own, or a teacher's or school's collection. Import a curriculum pack in Settings to add one; every piece stays free to open, play, and practice.
tracks_intro: Ordered practice paths through the catalogue — scales, arpeggios, and pieces in a sensible sequence. Follow a path downward; everything stays unlocked, so the order is just a suggestion and the markers show what you've already set a score on.
progress_intro: Your streak, days practiced, and notes played — tracked privately on this device. Finish a run in any mode to add to it, then share your progress grid.
progress_empty: No practice logged yet — finish a run to start your streak.
progress_grid_label: Accuracy, timing and flow across your recent sessions
import_intro: Plinky keeps your scores on your device instead of bundling a big library. Add your own from any MusicXML file (export from MuseScore, Finale, Flat, and most notation apps), and share them with others.
import_own_prefix: Have your own notation? Paste it on the
import_own_middle: . Got a score pack or a school's curriculum? Import it in
import_share_prefix: Want to share a score with everyone?
midi_unsupported_keyboard: This browser does not expose the Web MIDI API. Use Chrome, Edge, or Firefox on desktop or Android — or play with your computer keyboard below.
sprint_intro: Sight-reading drills with fresh notes every run — read the phrase at sight, play it on your keyboard, and see how you're graded on accuracy, timing, and flow.
play_not_found: That score isn't on this device.
ear_intro: Train your ear: hear a note, then find it on your MIDI or computer keyboard. Any octave counts — you're matching the pitch, not the key — and your accuracy is tracked as you go.
ear_which_note: Which note did you hear? Play it.
keyboard_hint_no_piano: No piano? Play with your computer keyboard:
keyboard_hint_shift: shift both hands an octave — current offset
import_no_notes: No playable notes found — is this valid MusicXML?
import_read_error: That file could not be read — try choosing it again.
import_save_failed: Could not save the score — it may exceed this device's storage.
score_load_error: This score couldn't be displayed — the MusicXML may be malformed.
import_placeholder: Paste MusicXML, or choose a .musicxml file below.
backup_intro: Your scores are saved only on this device — {count} so far. Download a backup, or import a score pack (such as a curriculum shared by a teacher).
backup_import_error: That file could not be imported.
midi_debug_intro: Connect a digital piano and confirm note events arrive in the browser.
midi_debug_unsupported: This browser does not expose the Web MIDI API. Use Chrome, Edge, or Firefox on desktop or Android — Safari (macOS and iOS) is not supported.
